text: The MM shall allow the user to configure model jobs.
The MM shall allow the user to schedule model jobs.
The MM shall allow the user to run model jobs.
The MM shall allow the user to monitor model jobs.
The MM shall allow the user to stop model jobs.
The MM shall allow the user to restart or resume model jobs.
The MM shall automate the setup and monitoring of model jobs.
The MM shall provide an automated node management system.
The MM shall be accessible via a web-based GUI.
The MM shall be accessible via a command line tool.
The MM shall operate in conjunction with MetVault.
The MM shall operate as a stand-alone application without MetVault.
The MM shall manage jobs on one or more clusters.
The MM shall allocate nodes across managed clusters.
The MM shall select the cluster for job execution based on system state.
The MM shall allow the user to specify a specific cluster for customized jobs.
The MM shall provide a Job-Setup module for model and post-processing job configuration.
The MM shall support the submission of 'by-hand' jobs.
The MM shall support job submission via a job configuration file.
The MM shall allow the user to retrieve and resubmit previously saved job configurations.
The MM shall provide a default GMOD job configuration.
The MM shall accept and run custom GMOD jobs using user-supplied input data or processors.
The MM shall allow the user to select between MM5 or WRF models.
The MM shall require the user to define a unique JOBID for each job.
The MM shall allow the user to define model domains.
The MM shall prompt the user to specify 'case study' or 're-run' if the cycle time is in the past.
The MM shall allow the user to specify cycle interval and forecast length.
The MM shall allow the user to specify restart file write frequency.
The MM shall allow the user to choose between predefined or custom sigma-level configurations.
The MM shall send email notifications upon job start, end, and termination.
The MM shall support standard IC/BC data sources including ETA and GFS.
The MM shall require a specified data source and time period for off-line jobs.
The MM shall allow the user to provide custom IC/BC pre-processing scripts.
The MM shall support standard observation data sources including WMO and MADIS.
The MM shall present MM5-executables based on domain size and node count.
The MM shall allow the user to run Final Analysis for re-runs and case studies.
The MM shall allow the user to save model output to the MetVault.
The MM shall support ClimoFDDA job integration.
The MM shall allow the user to specify destination hosts for post-processing output products.
The MM shall require a job id and script location for 'by-hand' job registration.
The MM shall display a job table containing user id and job status.
The MM shall allow a super user to stop any running job.
The MM shall record any known inconsistencies across its architecture models.
The MM shall uniquely identify every software requirement.
The MM shall provide 95% of transaction processing in less than 1 second.
The MM shall include a rationale for each included architecture viewpoint.
The MM shall protect software from unauthorized access via security factors.
